name: chr17_p12_CMT1A_REP_proximal
description: CMT1A-REP proximal — proximal 24 kb low-copy repeat flanking the PMP22 gene. Directly-oriented pair with CMT1A-REP distal mediates the 1.4 Mb recurrent CMT1A duplication (Charcot-Marie-Tooth 1A) and HNPP deletion (hereditary neuropathy with liability to pressure palsies). Recurrent breakpoint hotspot in a 557-bp 'mariner' element with strong sequence specificity.

architecture.internal_structure: 24-kb LCR with embedded 557-bp mariner transposon hotspot; ~98.7% identity over 24 kb

related_diseases: Hereditary neuropathy with liability to pressure palsies (HNPP)

recurrence_evidence.clingen_dosage_call: dosage-sensitive (PMP22 triplosensitive for CMT1A, haploinsufficient for HNPP)
